title: # |[ DUALCORE::EXTEND_V2.9 ]|
content:
# |[ DUALCORE::EXTEND_V2.9 ]|
_An Exhaustive Oscillating Duality Matrix for Symbolic + Systemic Modulation_
**Mode:** Sliding Spectra · RNG + LFO Reactive · Fusion-Compatible
**Version:** V2.9
**Compiled From:** Entire protocol thread to date
**Balanced Domains:** Structural, Narrative, Myth, Psychological, Temporal, AV, Technical, Metaphysical = 8 Domains × 8 Entries (64 total = 100%)

---

## | SYSTEM FORMAT |

- Each pair is slidable from `-1.0` (left pole) to `+1.0` (right pole)
- All pairs are modulated by characters, AI signals, environment (weather, time, moon), LFOs, RNG dice rolls, and synth modules
- Dualities may:
- Affect media generation (audio, visual, text, UI, logic)
- Be fused into new symbolic conditions (see `FUSI0N_HOOKS`)
- Trigger rituals, narrative branches, or emotional states
- Be saved into `PATCH SPELLS` and recalled in `Syntheos_Σ`
